SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-15-2007 - JUDGMENT. COMM PAUL SLAVIT; F. RAYRAY, CLERK. NOT REPORTED IN (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ARGO, GUY M. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEE, SUSANNA H $3,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,075.00, IT APPEARS TO THE COURT THAT DEFENDANT YEE IS ONE OF THE THREE REMAINING C0-FOUNDERS OF THE BUSINESS. THE JUDGMENT REPRESENTS ONE THIRD OF THE $7500.00 MAXIMUM DAMAGES AVAILABLE TO PLAINTIFF IN SMALL CLAIMS COURT, PLUS $500 DAMAGES FOR DEFAMATORY STATEMENTS MADE BY DEFENDNAT.
